name: Community Credit Counseling
description_short: Nonprofit credit counseling corporation in Neptune, NJ providing debt management, financial education, and credit counseling services to help consumers manage debt responsibly.
description_long:
Community Credit Counseling Corporation is a nonprofit organization based in Neptune, New Jersey, with a mission to provide debt management assistance and educational services that promote responsible use of consumer credit and personal finances. The organization focuses on urban and community economic development through financial literacy and credit guidance.

The organization offers comprehensive credit counseling and debt management services to clients. Their programs include personal credit counseling sessions, debt management plan creation and implementation, financial education seminars and workshops, and public educational materials on personal finance. They utilize established programs like the FDIC Money Smart program and their own Debt Guard financial literacy programs to reach consumers at various financial literacy levels.

According to their fiscal year 2017/2018 data, Community Credit Counseling Corporation demonstrated significant community impact by educating approximately 2,100 individuals through financial education seminars and programs. They conducted approximately 1,100 counseling sessions, serviced approximately 175 new debt management plans and 250 existing plans, and facilitated approximately 41 clients successfully completing their debt management plans. They work directly with creditors to facilitate debt management arrangements on behalf of clients.

As a nonprofit organization with an EIN and established track record, Community Credit Counseling Corporation provides free or low-cost services typical of nonprofit credit counseling agencies. However, the organization has limited online review presence (only 1 review on GreatNonprofits), which limits public feedback data. Their primary contact information and website are available, but detailed current service offerings and pricing structures are not fully documented in accessible online sources.
pros: Established nonprofit with 501(c)(3) status (EIN 04-3418214) ensuring legitimate, mission-driven operations
Conducts approximately 1,100 credit counseling sessions annually, demonstrating significant capacity and activity
Serves approximately 425 debt management plan clients annually (175 new + 250 existing), showing active debt resolution support
Educates approximately 2,100 individuals per year through financial literacy seminars and programs
Works collaboratively with creditors to facilitate favorable debt management arrangements
Utilizes established financial education frameworks including FDIC Money Smart program
Reported positive client outcome with 41 clients successfully completing debt management plans in FY 2017/2018
cons: Only 1 review available on GreatNonprofits, providing minimal public feedback on service quality
No current pricing or cost structure information available online to assess affordability
Service data provided is from fiscal year 2017/2018, now several years outdated with no recent statistics available
Limited online presence and digital information makes it difficult to assess current operations and program offerings
No documented accreditation status (such as NFCC membership) visible in provided materials
best_for: New Jersey residents struggling with multiple debts seeking nonprofit debt management assistance
Consumers wanting to work with creditors through a third-party counselor without upfront fees
Individuals seeking financial literacy education and credit counseling in the local Neptune, NJ area
diagnosis: Community Credit Counseling Corporation is best for New Jersey residents needing nonprofit debt management and financial counseling services, particularly those seeking creditor negotiation support. The primary caveat is that service data is outdated (from 2017/2018), and there is minimal public review information available online to assess current service quality.
services: Debt management plan implementation and servicing
Personal financial literacy materials and resources
